summary: Remove the artificial 1-hour minimum on send --remind-in.
reason: buildSendReminder rejected any duration shorter than 1h with "send: --remind-in must be at least 1h", but the Superhuman web app accepts 1-minute reminders and the backend round-trips them fine. The floor was generator-emitted client-side fiction. Now only non-positive durations are rejected (the parse layer already does that; this branch is defense-in-depth).
validated_outcome: TestBuildSendReminderValidation covers 5m success; TestSend_ReminderFlagErrors covers 0s rejection.
